1.Overview
This document describes the step of creating Requirement list.
Extract the contents of the Requirement spec into requirement list file following the rules
2.Step of creating Requirement list
2.1. The items in the requirement list
[START_IMAGE]/home/khoinn12/Documents/cap/capstone-project/Phase_2/backend/src/processor/parsed/excel/eb86f7017050f9e76de07af10eec88c6/xl/media/image8.png[END_IMAGE]
Requirement ID	management number to distinguish each requirement. Formular, do not update
Function Level1 ~ Level6	classify level of function
Requirement	The requirement in the requirement spec document
Requirement type	type of requirement
Requirement Version	Functional specification version
Change request No.	change request no. of the requirement	45934
Req Creation type	Change classification of requirement
2.2. Proceduce
R1	1- Requirement ID
Use format REQ_func_Function name_xxxxx
Example	REQ_func_iPod_00001
2- Requirement Level
R2	Requirement Level1	Write function Name
Ex: iPod

2.2. Proceduce
R1	1- Requirement ID
Use format REQ_func_Function name_xxxxx
Example	REQ_func_iPod_00001
2- Requirement Level
R2	Requirement Level1	Write function Name
Ex: iPod
For Function Navi, the Requirement Level1 will be referenced from the corresponding function starting at line 17 in the "Data list" sheet.
R3	Requirement Level2	Write spec No
Ex: 530
R4	Requirement Level3	file name ( don’t have version and extension)
Ex: Chapter04-11_Function_Specification_iOS
R5, R6, R7	Requirement Level4 ~ Level6
Copy and paste the funciton item name in the spec document
* with excel file: Level4 = sheet name
For bug/ticket (don't have spec file)
Requirement Level1	Write function Name
Ex: iPod
Requirement Level2	Write spec No
Ex: 530
Requirement Level3	bug ID
Ex: DC24-54088
Requirement Level4 ~ Level6
content overview of bug/ticket
*) If the content of the current cell is equal to the cell above, the text color should turn gray.
* Each cell has not value, fill "-"
3- Requirement

content overview of bug/ticket

* Each cell has not value, fill "-"
3- Requirement
The following rules
R8	-	if spec writes by  2 languages (EN &JP), need use all of them for requirement. If spec only EN or JP, create requirement the same it
R9	-	Extract 1 line in the specification as 1 requirement and paste into requirement list.

Ex

R11	+ If the paragraph contains more than 1 lines, but its content is 1 requirement, don't separate it into individual lines
Ex

[START_SHAPE]///RightBrace[END_SHAPE]
Write spec version
When spec change, if the requirement has changed, fill new version. If the requirement has not changed, don't change version.	Create a pair of version & change type
Used to track which version of specification this requirement is added/New/Modify/Delete
6- Req Creation type
Write Change classification
R20	New	If Test requirement is change into "Yes"(If add new item)
R21	Add	If Test requirement is change into "Yes"(If add more item after finish the first version)
R22	Modify	If modify contents of the requirement
R23	Delete	If deleted the requirement

Rule tách dữ liệu
1/	Nếu spec viết bằng 2 ngôn ngữ (EN & JP), cần gộp 2 ngôn ngữ thành 1 requirement
Abnormal:
- Chỉ có tiếng anh hoặc tiếng nhật
- Rule bình thường là 1 câu tiếng nhật 1 câu tiếng anh, hoặc cùng 1 line thì tiếng nhật trước tiếng anh sau
- Thi thoảng có trường hợp: cả một đoạn tiếng nhật rồi đến một đoạn tiếng anh
-  Có chỗ tiếng nhật trước tiếng anh sau, Có chỗ ngược lại
